H1_rural_penetration.summary: Tisza won ~40 rural constituencies that Fidesz gerrymandered for itself, constituting 55% of all flips

H2_record_turnout.summary: Record 79.51% turnout was broad-based; rural/young breakdown unavailable at OEVK level

H3_same_weapon.summary: 2026 Gallagher index (13.36) comparable to Fidesz era avg (13.48)

H4_reform_needed.summary: Under any proportional system, Tisza governs but lacks supermajority. Reform is structurally justified.
